label: SOURCE ONLY
observedExistingServerPatterns: Fieel's Community already has moderation logs, ticket transcript logs, welcome/rules, announcements/updates/uploads, shop-like sales channels, support tickets, social outfit/cape channels, and basic voice channels.

Competitive servers repeatedly use challenge tickets, referee approval, pending score approval, rank/spot leaderboards, training hoster activity logs, tryout result channels, hoster promotion/stay/demotion summaries, and region-specific channels.
recommendedImplementation: Keep community and clan as two separate owner-only setup modes; never blind-delete the guild.
Snapshot roles/channels/permissions before setup, create preview/diff, require Discord-side owner confirmation, and prefer archiving over hard deletion.
Use Discord-native Community Onboarding, Rules Screening, Server Guide, Forum channels, slash commands, buttons, select menus, modals, and attachment command options where possible.
Use DM language prompts only as best-effort; keep a public choose-language/choose-pings fallback.
Use Media & Links Approved plus AutoMod/bot fallback to reduce stolen-account scam links/images without false-banning first mistakes.

For TSB-inspired systems, add training sessions, training results, tournament bracket/simple modes, challenge tickets, referee approvals, staff activity quotas, and leaderboard history, but keep Fima community separate from a pure clan identity.

sourceStatus.liveDiscordSetup: BLOCKED BY MISSING ACCESS OR NOT YET RUNTIME TESTED
